channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Oil prices jump as US and Iran trade attacks over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Brent crude climbs more than 4 percent as Washington and Tehran clash over control of critical waterway.

item.title: Israel releases video of hidden tunnels below Lebanon’s Beaufort Castle
item.description: The Israeli Army has released footage of what it says are hidden tunnels under Lebanon’s historic Beaufort Castle.

item.title: At least 27 dead as fire engulfs popular Bangkok pub near Chatuchak market
item.description: At least 27 people were killed and 63 injured, many critically, after a fire ripped through a popular pub in Bangkok.

item.title: Japan’s pet care industry booms as ‘fur babies’ outnumber infants
item.description: Japanese baby product manufacturers turn their attention to the pet market amid collapsing birthrate.

item.title: Can Nigeria’s drone industry deliver Africa’s defence sovereignty
item.description: Military manufacturing may be growing, but defence sovereignty depends on far more than production.

item.title: US launches more strikes on Iran as Strait of Hormuz standoff deepens
item.description: The US has launched a new wave of strikes on Iran targeting Tehran's ability to threaten shipping in the strait.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan after US bombings
item.description: Iranian state media report explosions in port cities of Bandar Abbas, Sirik and Jask, as well as Qeshm Island.

item.title: Mitch McConnell releases health update, says he is ‘regaining’ strength
item.description: The US Republican senator has been absent from Congress during a weeks-long hospitalisation, spurring party concern.

item.title: US launches new wave of strikes against Iran, aimed at ‘degrading’ military
item.description: Sunday's attacks follow three previous days of tit-for-tat strikes between Iran and US as a June ceasefire deal frays.

item.title: Detained by settlers, US Democrat Ro Khanna now faces pro-Israel attacks
item.description: Progressive congressman accuses Israeli military of 'lying' after settlers held up his van in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Israel releases video of huge detonations in Lebanon
item.description: The Israeli military has released video showing huge explosions and detonations in villages in southern Lebanon.

item.title: Deadly Israeli strikes pound Gaza
item.description: Israel’s military has attacked several places across Gaza.

item.title: Israel to hold national elections on October 27, parliament says
item.description: Netanyahu, Israel's longest-serving prime minister, has confirmed that he will run for office again.

item.title: Protest on London’s Tower Bridge demands release of Dr Hussam Abu Safia
item.description: Pro-Palestine activists unfurled a giant Palestinian flag and a banner on London's Tower Bridge.

item.title: Lindsey Graham, hardline backer of US-Israeli wars, dies aged 71
item.description: US senator Lindsey Graham, a key ally of Israel and one of Washington’s most prominent foreign policy hawks, has died.

item.title: The man who changed the Arab world
item.description: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani has died at age 74.

item.title: Fire engulfs popular Bangkok pub, killing 27 people and injuring 63
item.description: Footage shared online by first responders showed a huge blaze raging in the Na Ladprao pub.

item.title: Sinner beats Zverev to defend Wimbledon men’s singles tennis title
item.description: Italy's Jannik Sinner beats Germany's Alexander Zverev 6-7 (7-9) 7-6 (7-2) 6-3 6-4 to claim his fifth Grand Slam.

item.title: Qatar’s former emir remembered as ‘a man of vision and courage’
item.description: US diplomat Adam Ereli remembers Qatar’s former Emir Sheikh as a personable and charismatic leader.

item.title: How will Qatar’s Father Emir be remembered?
item.description: Former Emir Sheikh Hamad Bin Khalifa Al Thani has died

item.title: Former Spain PM criticised for ‘xenophobic’ remark on French World Cup team
item.description: Mariano Rajoy condemned for opinion piece on Spanish website El Debate ahead of World Cup semifinal.

item.title: Iran says almost a dozen ‘enemy projectiles’ targeted Qeshm Island
item.description: New explosions have been heard in Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island.

item.title: Nine dead as Russia and Ukraine trade drone and missile salvos
item.description: Ukraine is particularly vulnerable to Russian ballistic missiles due to critical shortage of Patriot munitions.

item.title: Iraqi PM to meet US President Trump in Washington to deepen strategic ties
item.description: Oil and gas deals are expected ⁠to be signed as part of a broader push ​for economic, trade and investment cooperation.

item.title: England vs Argentina: Greatest moments before FIFA World Cup semifinal
item.description: England and Argentina renew their longstanding football rivalry with a World Cup final place at stake.
